message:
Fix critical bugs and add missing features from user interview

1. Fix merge data loss: recurse into directories when both sides
   modified (was taking one side wholesale, dropping the other's files)
2. Fix concurrent commit lost updates: optimistic locking retries
   commit if the ref moved between read and write
3. Add input validation: require ref/message/files on commit,
   default author to "unknown" instead of literal "undefined"
4. Fix empty body crash on POST /init: gracefully default to {}
5. Add GET /api/repos and GET /api/repos/:owner list-repos endpoints
6. Fix production wrangler.jsonc: point main to src/worker.ts,
   remove stale vinext assets config
7. Fix deploy workflow: add libgit2 WASM build step and binaryen install

files.patch:
@@ -28,12 +28,16 @@ jobs:
 
       - run: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
 
+      - name: Install Binaryen (wasm-opt)
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y binaryen
+
+      - name: Build libgit2 for WASM
+        run: bash wasm/libgit2-wasm/build.sh
+
       - name: Build WASM
         run: pnpm run build:wasm
 
-      - name: Build
-        run: pnpm run build
-
       - name: Provision R2 bucket
         uses: cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3
         with:
